corrections.note: The right-side running head includes the section letter B.

corrections.current: ἐν αὐτοῖς ἐθεράπευσεν καὶ ἦρεν τὸν πόνον αὐτοῦ,
corrections.correct: ἐν αὐτοῖς ἐθεράπευσεν καὶ ἦρεν τὸν πόνον αὐτοῦ·
corrections.note: Printed punctuation is a raised point, not comma.
The printed accent is acute on ι, not circumflex on ῖ.
A space is present after the parenthetical verse marker.
Printed punctuation is a raised point, not full stop.

corrections.current: καὶ ποίησον τὸ πένθος κατὰ τὴν ἀξίαν αὐτοῦ
corrections.correct: καὶ ποίησον τὸ πένθος κατὰ τὴν ἀξίαν αὐτοῦ·
corrections.note: Printed punctuation is a raised point at the end of the line.
There appears to be a second point after ἰσχύν in the scan, but this may be an artifact; flagged conservatively.
The apparatus prints ανθ, not ἀν.

corrections.current: τον πονον] παν πονον A ℵAC
corrections.correct: τον πονον] παν πονον A ℵAC |
corrections.note: A separator bar follows this variant before the next entry.
The siglum is eta/ΗAC in the print, not lambda.
There is a space before A in the printed apparatus.
The apparatus entry reads ευωδια ℵ, not C.
The apparatus line for v.14 is incomplete in the transcription.
The printed apparatus uses parentheses, not square brackets.

corrections.current: παραβαινει] παραμενει ℵ* παραμενει ℵc.aA | om και 10 ℵc.a
corrections.correct: παραβαινει] παραμενει ℵ* παραμενει ℵc.a A | om και 10 ℵc.a
corrections.note: There is a space before A after ℵc.a.

uncertain.note: After ἰσχύν the scan may show punctuation beyond the expected raised point; likely artifact, not certain enough to enforce.
